exercises.name: Flat DB Press (Heavy)
exercises.notes: Focus on strength here. Each week add weight or reps. Keep form consistent.

exercises.name: Flat DB Press (Back off)
exercises.notes: Focus on mind-muscle connection with pecs. Drop the weight back and focus on stretch and squeeze!

exercises.name: 2-Grip Lat Pulldown
exercises.notes: Do first set wide overhand (1.5x shoulder width), second set underhand (1x shoulder width)

exercises.name: Seated DB Shoulder Press
exercises.notes: Bring the dumbbells all the way down, keep your torso upright

exercises.name: Seated Cable Row
exercises.notes: Focus on squeezing your shoulder blades together, drive your elbows down and back. Last set only do a dropset: perform 10-12 reps, drop the weight by ~50%, perform an additional 10-12 reps.

exercises.name: A1: EZ Bar Skull Crusher
exercises.notes: Arc the bar behind your head, constant tension on triceps

exercises.name: A2: EZ Bar Curl
exercises.notes: Arc the bar "out" not "up", focus on squeezing your biceps

exercises.name: Hack Squat (Heavy)
exercises.notes: Focus on strength here. Each week add weight or reps. Keep form consistent.

exercises.name: Hack Squat (Back off)
exercises.notes: Drop the weight back and focus on controlling the negative. Smooth and consistent rep tempo.

exercises.name: Seated Hamstring Curl
exercises.notes: Dropset: perform 10-12 reps, drop the weight by ~50%, perform an additional 10-12 reps. Do seated if available. Otherwise do Lying Leg Curl or Nordic Ham Curl.

exercises.name: A1: Standing Calf Raise
exercises.notes: Press all the way up to your toes, stretch your calves at the bottom, don't bounce

exercises.name: A2: Hanging Leg Raise
exercises.notes: Knees to chest, controlled reps, straighten legs more to increase difficulty

exercises.name: Machine Shoulder Press
exercises.notes: Don't stop in between reps, keep smooth and controlled tension on the delts

exercises.name: Cable Chest Press
exercises.notes: Can be performed seated or standing. Focus on squeezing your chest. Last set only do a dropset: perform 10-12 reps, drop the weight by ~50%, perform an additional 10-12 reps.

exercises.name: Triceps Pressdown
exercises.notes: Focus on squeezing your triceps to move the weight. Last set only do a dropset: perform 12-15 reps, drop the weight by ~50%, perform an additional 12-15 reps.

exercises.name: Close-Grip Push Up
exercises.notes: Hands slightly narrower than shoulder width. Keep your elbows tucked in close to your torso. As many reps as possible!

exercises.name: DB Lateral Raise
exercises.notes: Raise the dumbbells "out" not "up", mind muscle connection with middle fibers

exercises.name: 1-Arm Half-Kneeling Lat Pulldown
exercises.notes: Keep chest tall, keep elbow tucked in close to your torso, focus on squeezing your lat to move the weight

exercises.name: Weighted Pullup
exercises.notes: 1.5x shoulder width grip, pull your chest to the bar

exercises.name: Pendlay Row
exercises.notes: Initiate the movement by squeezing your shoulder blades together, pull to your lower chest, avoid using momentum

exercises.name: Bayesian Cable Curl
exercises.notes: Keep your elbow behind your torso throughout the range of motion, focus on squeezing your bicep. Sets are per arm

exercises.name: Rope Facepull
exercises.notes: Pull your elbows up and out, squeeze your shoulder blades together. Last set only do a dropset: perform 10-12 reps, drop the weight by ~50%, perform an additional 10-12 reps.

exercises.name: Romanian Deadlift
exercises.notes: Maintain a neutral lower back, set your hips back, don't allow your spine to round

exercises.name: Leg Press
exercises.notes: Medium width feet placement on the platform, don't allow your lower back to round

exercises.name: Leg Extension
exercises.notes: Dropset: perform 10-12 reps, drop the weight by ~50%, perform an additional 10-12 reps. Focus on squeezing your quads to make the weight move.

exercises.name: A1: Seated Calf Raise
exercises.notes: Press all the way up to your toes, stretch your calves at the bottom, don't bounce

exercises.name: A2: Cable Crunch
exercises.notes: Round your back as you crunch

exercises.name: Flat DB Press (Heavy)
exercises.notes: Focus on strength here. Each week add weight or reps. Keep form consistent.

exercises.notes: Focus on mind-muscle connection with pecs. Drop the weight back and focus on stretch and squeeze!

exercises.name: Pendlay Row

exercises.name: Bayesian Cable Curl
exercises.notes: Keep your elbow behind your torso throughout the range of motion, focus on squeezing your bicep. Sets are per arm

exercises.name: Rope Facepull
exercises.notes: Pull your elbows up and out, squeeze your shoulder blades together. Last set only do a dropset: perform 10-12 reps, drop the weight by ~50%, perform an additional 10-12 reps.

exercises.name: Romanian Deadlift
exercises.notes: Maintain a neutral lower back, set your hips back, don't allow your spine to round

exercises.name: Leg Press
exercises.notes: Medium width feet placement on the platform, don't allow your lower back to round

exercises.name: Leg Extension
exercises.notes: Dropset: perform 10-12 reps, drop the weight by ~50%, perform an additional 10-12 reps. Focus on squeezing your quads to make the weight move.

exercises.name: A1: Seated Calf Raise
exercises.notes: Press all the way up to your toes, stretch your calves at the bottom, don't bounce

exercises.name: A2: Cable Crunch
exercises.notes: Round your back as you crunch

exercises.name: 2-Grip Pullup
exercises.notes: First set 1.5x shoulder width grip. Second set 1.0x shoulder width grip

exercises.name: Weighted Dip (Heavy)
exercises.notes: Tuck your elbows at 45°, lean your torso forward 15°, shoulder width or slightly wider grip

exercises.name: Weighted Dip (Back off)
exercises.notes: Tuck your elbows at 45°, lean your torso forward 15°, shoulder width or slightly wider grip

exercises.name: Incline Chest-Supported DB Row
exercises.notes: Keep elbows at ~30° angle from torso. Pull the weight towards your navel

exercises.name: Standing DB Arnold Press
exercises.notes: Start with your elbows in front of you and palms facing in. Rotate the dumbbells so that your palms face forward as you press.

exercises.name: A1: DB Incline Curl
exercises.notes: Brace upper back against bench, 45 degree incline, keep shoulders back as you curl

exercises.name: A2: DB French Press
exercises.notes: Can perform seated or standing. Press the dumbbell straight up and down behind your head.

exercises.name: Single-Leg Leg Press (Heavy)
exercises.notes: High and wide foot positioning, start with weaker leg

exercises.name: Single-Leg Leg Press (Back off)
exercises.notes: High and wide foot positioning, start with weaker leg

exercises.name: Glute-Ham Raise
exercises.notes: Keep your hips straight, do Nordic ham curls if no GHR machine

exercises.name: A1: Roman Chair Crunch
exercises.notes: Don't swing your legs at the bottom, minimize momentum, tuck your knees towards your chest if lifting your legs straight out is too challenging

exercises.name: A2: Seated Calf Raise
exercises.notes: Press all the way up to your toes, stretch your calves at the bottom, don't bounce

exercises.name: Machine Chest Press
exercises.notes: Focus on squeezing your chest

exercises.name: Seated DB Shoulder Press
exercises.notes: Bring the dumbbells all the way down, keep your torso upright

exercises.name: Cable Triceps Kickback
exercises.notes: Lean slightly forward, lock your elbow behind your torso (shoulder hyperextension). Last set only do a dropset: perform 12-15 reps, drop the weight by ~50%, perform an additional 12-15 reps.

exercises.name: Close-Grip Push Up
exercises.notes: Hands slightly narrower than shoulder width. Keep your elbows tucked in close to your torso. As many reps as possible!

exercises.name: Cable Lateral Raise
exercises.notes: Lean away from the cable. Focus on squeezing your delts.

exercises.name: 1-Arm Half-Kneeling Lat Pulldown
exercises.notes: Keep chest tall, keep elbow tucked in close to your torso, focus on squeezing your lat to move the weight

exercises.name: T-Bar Row
exercises.notes: Focus on squeezing your shoulder blades together as you pull the weight towards you. Keep your shoulders down (avoid shrugging).

exercises.name: Lat Pulldown
exercises.notes: Think about pulling your elbows "down" and "in". Last set only do a dropset: perform 8-10 reps, drop the weight by ~50%, perform an additional 8-10 reps.

exercises.name: Reverse Pec Deck
exercises.notes: Swing the weight "out", not "back". Last set only do a dropset: perform 12-15 reps, drop the weight by ~50%, perform an additional 12-15 reps.

exercises.name: Spider Curl
exercises.notes: Brace your chest against an incline bench, curl with your elbows slightly in front of you. Last set only do a dropset: perform 12-15 reps, drop the weight by ~50%, perform an additional 12-15 reps.

exercises.name: DB Bulgarian Split Squat
exercises.notes: Start with your weaker leg. Squat deep

exercises.name: DB Romanian Deadlift
exercises.notes: Emphasize the stretch in your hamstrings, prevent your lower back from rounding

exercises.name: Goblet Squat
exercises.notes: Hold the dumbbell underneath your chin, sit back and down, push your knees out laterally

exercises.name: A1: Leg Press Toe Press
exercises.notes: Press all the way up to your toes, stretch your calves at the bottom, don't bounce

exercises.name: A2: Machine Crunch
exercises.notes: Squeeze your abs to move the weight, don't use your arms to help

exercises.name: 2-Grip Pullup
exercises.notes: First set 1.5x shoulder width grip. Second set 1.0x shoulder width grip

exercises.notes: Tuck your elbows at 45°, lean your torso forward 15°, shoulder width or slightly wider grip

exercises.name: Spider Curl
exercises.notes: Brace your chest against an incline bench, curl with your elbows slightly in front of you. Last set only do a dropset: perform 12-15 reps, drop the weight by ~50%, perform an additional 12-15 reps.

exercises.name: DB Bulgarian Split Squat
exercises.notes: Start with your weaker leg. Squat deep

exercises.name: DB Romanian Deadlift
exercises.notes: Emphasize the stretch in your hamstrings, prevent your lower back from rounding

exercises.name: Goblet Squat
exercises.notes: Hold the dumbbell underneath your chin, sit back and down, push your knees out laterally

exercises.name: A1: Leg Press Toe Press
exercises.notes: Press all the way up to your toes, stretch your calves at the bottom, don't bounce

exercises.name: A2: Machine Crunch
exercises.notes: Squeeze your abs to move the weight, don't use your arms to help

exercises.name: 2-Grip Pullup
exercises.notes: First set 1.5x shoulder width grip. Second set 1.0x shoulder width grip

exercises.name: Weighted Dip (Heavy)
exercises.notes: Tuck your elbows at 45°, lean your torso forward 15°, shoulder width or slightly wider grip

exercises.name: Weighted Dip (Back off)
exercises.notes: Tuck your elbows at 45°, lean your torso forward 15°, shoulder width or slightly wider grip

exercises.name: Incline Chest-Supported DB Row
exercises.notes: Keep elbows at ~30° angle from torso. Pull the weight towards your navel

exercises.name: Standing DB Arnold Press
exercises.notes: Start with your elbows in front of you and palms facing in. Rotate the dumbbells so that your palms face forward as you press.

exercises.name: A1: DB Incline Curl
exercises.notes: Brace upper back against bench, 45 degree incline, keep shoulders back as you curl

exercises.name: A2: DB French Press
exercises.notes: Can perform seated or standing. Press the dumbbell straight up and down behind your head.

exercises.name: Single-Leg Leg Press (Heavy)
exercises.notes: High and wide foot positioning, start with weaker leg

exercises.name: Single-Leg Leg Press (Back off)
exercises.notes: High and wide foot positioning, start with weaker leg

exercises.name: Glute-Ham Raise
exercises.notes: Keep your hips straight, do Nordic ham curls if no GHR machine

exercises.name: A1: Roman Chair Crunch
exercises.notes: Don't swing your legs at the bottom, minimize momentum, tuck your knees towards your chest if lifting your legs straight out is too challenging

exercises.name: A2: Seated Calf Raise
exercises.notes: Press all the way up to your toes, stretch your calves at the bottom, don't bounce

exercises.name: Machine Chest Press
exercises.notes: Focus on squeezing your chest

exercises.name: Seated DB Shoulder Press
exercises.notes: Bring the dumbbells all the way down, keep your torso upright

exercises.name: Cable Triceps Kickback
exercises.notes: Lean slightly forward, lock your elbow behind your torso (shoulder hyperextension). Last set only do a dropset: perform 12-15 reps, drop the weight by ~50%, perform an additional 12-15 reps.

exercises.name: Close-Grip Push Up
exercises.notes: Hands slightly narrower than shoulder width. Keep your elbows tucked in close to your torso. As many reps as possible!

exercises.name: Cable Lateral Raise
exercises.notes: Lean away from the cable. Focus on squeezing your delts.

exercises.name: 1-Arm Half-Kneeling Lat Pulldown
exercises.notes: Keep chest tall, keep elbow tucked in close to your torso, focus on squeezing your lat to move the weight

exercises.name: T-Bar Row
exercises.notes: Focus on squeezing your shoulder blades together as you pull the weight towards you. Keep your shoulders down (avoid shrugging).

exercises.name: Lat Pulldown
exercises.notes: Think about pulling your elbows "down" and "in". Last set only do a dropset: perform 8-10 reps, drop the weight by ~50%, perform an additional 8-10 reps.

exercises.name: Reverse Pec Deck
exercises.notes: Swing the weight "out", not "back". Last set only do a dropset: perform 12-15 reps, drop the weight by ~50%, perform an additional 12-15 reps.

exercises.name: Spider Curl
exercises.notes: Brace your chest against an incline bench, curl with your elbows slightly in front of you. Last set only do a dropset: perform 12-15 reps, drop the weight by ~50%, perform an additional 12-15 reps.

exercises.name: DB Bulgarian Split Squat
exercises.notes: Start with your weaker leg. Squat deep

exercises.name: DB Romanian Deadlift
exercises.notes: Emphasize the stretch in your hamstrings, prevent your lower back from rounding

exercises.name: Goblet Squat
exercises.notes: Hold the dumbbell underneath your chin, sit back and down, push your knees out laterally

exercises.name: A1: Leg Press Toe Press
exercises.notes: Press all the way up to your toes, stretch your calves at the bottom, don't bounce

exercises.name: A2: Machine Crunch
exercises.notes: Squeeze your abs to move the weight, don't use your arms to help

exercises.name: Machine Chest Press (Heavy)
exercises.notes: Focus on squeezing your chest

exercises.name: Machine Chest Press (Back off)
exercises.notes: Focus on squeezing your chest

exercises.name: Machine Pulldown
exercises.notes: Think about pulling your elbows "down" and "in". Last set only do a dropset: perform 10-12 reps, drop the weight by ~50%, perform an additional 10-12 reps.

exercises.name: Cable Shoulder Press
exercises.notes: Bring cables all the way down to shoulder height, keep torso upright. Last set only do a dropset: perform 12-15 reps, drop the weight by ~50%, perform an additional 12-15 reps.

exercises.name: Helms DB Row
exercises.notes: Be ultra strict with form, drive elbows out and back at 45 degree angle

exercises.name: A1: Overhead Cable Triceps Extension
exercises.notes: Do both arms at once, resist the negative

exercises.name: A2: Cable EZ Curl
exercises.notes: Focus on squeezing your biceps. Control the negative

exercises.name: Machine Squat (Heavy)
exercises.notes: Focus on strength here. Each week add weight or reps. Keep form consistent.

exercises.name: Machine Squat (Back off)
exercises.notes: Drop the weight back and focus on controlling the negative. Smooth and consistent rep tempo.

exercises.name: Nordic Ham Curl
exercises.notes: Keep your hips as straight as you can, can sub for lying leg curl

exercises.name: A1: Seated Calf Raise
exercises.notes: Press all the way up to your toes, stretch your calves at the bottom, don't bounce

exercises.name: A2: Two-Arms Two-Legs Dead Bug
exercises.notes: Perform these slowly, focus on keeping your lower back against the ground throughout the set

exercises.name: Standing DB Arnold Press
exercises.notes: Start with your elbows in front of you and palms facing in. Rotate the dumbbells so that your palms face forward as you press.

exercises.name: Cable Chest Press
exercises.notes: Can be performed seated or standing. Focus on squeezing your chest. Last set only do a dropset: perform 10-12 reps, drop the weight by ~50%, perform an additional 10-12 reps.

exercises.name: DB Triceps Kickback
exercises.notes: Lean slightly forward, lock your elbow behind your torso (shoulder hyperextension). Last set only do a dropset: perform 10-12 reps, drop the weight by ~50%, perform an additional 10-12 reps.

exercises.name: Close-Grip Push Up
exercises.notes: Hands slightly narrower than shoulder width. Keep your elbows tucked in close to your torso. As many reps as possible!

exercises.name: Machine Lateral Raise
exercises.notes: Focus on squeezing your lateral delt to move the weight

exercises.name: 1-Arm Half-Kneeling Lat Pulldown
exercises.notes: Keep chest tall, keep elbow tucked in close to your torso, focus on squeezing your lat to move the weight

exercises.name: Neutral-Grip Lat Pulldown
exercises.notes: Pull your elbows down against your sides. Last set only do a dropset: perform 8-10 reps, drop the weight by ~50%, perform an additional 8-10 reps.

exercises.name: Meadows Row
exercises.notes: Brace with your non-working hand against your knee, stay light, emphasize form

exercises.name: Inverse Zottman Curl
exercises.notes: Hammer curl on concentric, supinated curl (palms up) on the eccentric. Last set only do a dropset: perform 10-12 reps, drop the weight by ~50%, perform an additional 10-12 reps.

exercises.name: Bent-Over Reverse DB Flye
exercises.notes: Mind-muscle connection with rear delts, sweep the weight out

exercises.name: Romanian Deadlift
exercises.notes: Maintain a neutral lower back, set your hips back, don't allow your spine to round

exercises.name: DB Walking Lunge
exercises.notes: Take medium strides, minimize the amount you push off your rear leg

exercises.name: Leg Extension
exercises.notes: Dropset: perform 12-15 reps, drop the weight by ~50%, perform an additional 12-15 reps. Focus on squeezing your quads to make the weight move.

exercises.name: A1: Standing Calf Raise
exercises.notes: Press all the way up to your toes, stretch your calves at the bottom, don't bounce

exercises.name: A2: Plate-Weighted Crunch
exercises.notes: Hold a plate or DB to your chest and crunch hard!

exercises.notes: Focus on squeezing your chest
